MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-UNDEAD_ARMY.title: Undead Army
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-JEALOUSY.descripti: Choose a card in target ally's [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Enchant[/gold] with [purple]Glam[/purple]. It gains [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-JEALOUSY.title: Jealousy
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-TRANSFUSION.descri:
You cannot draw additional cards this turn.
Transform all [gold]Souls[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Life Forces+|Life Forces}[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-TRANSFUSION.title: Transfusion
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-LIFE_FORCE.title: Life Force
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-PARTY_MASCOT.descr: Until Osty dies, you and all allies gain {PartyMascotPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-PARTY_MASCOT.title: Party Mascot
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SOUL_ECHOES.descri: The first time that you play a [gold]Soul[/gold] each turn, all allies add a [gold]Soul[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SOUL_ECHOES.title: Soul Echoes
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-RAISE_DEAD.descrip: Target ally Heals {Heal:diff()} HP. If this healing revives them, apply {DoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] to all enemies. Otherwise, you gain {DoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-RAISE_DEAD.title: Raise Dead
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-BESTOW_CURSE.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next debuff applied to this enemy is doubled.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-BESTOW_CURSE.title: Bestow Curse
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-STRIKE_RUSH.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
A random ally{IfUpgraded:show: [gold]Upgrades[/gold] and|} plays a [gold]Strike[/gold] from their [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] at the target.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-STRIKE_RUSH.title: Strike Rush
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-RICOCHET_BLADE.des:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
Put a [gold]Temporary[/gold] copy of this card into the [gold]Hand[/gold] of target ally
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FRONTLINER.descrip: Whenever an ally plays a card targeting you, gain {FrontlinerPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FRONTLINER.title: Frontliner
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-INVIGORATE.descrip: Heal {Heal:diff()} HP for each ally that is below {HpThreshold:diff()}% HP.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-INVIGORATE.title: Invigorate
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SHIELD_MASTER.desc:
You can target allies with untargeted [gold]Block[/gold] cards.
When you do, they gain 50% additional [gold]Block[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FINAL_STAND.descri:
Revive all allies.
You and your allies take an [gold]Extra Turn[/gold] after this one. At the end of that turn, all of you die.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FINAL_STAND.title: Final Stand
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SECOND_THAT.descri: Copy the next {IfUpgraded:show:2 |}{SecondThatPower:plural:Skill|Skills} played by an ally this turn.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SECOND_THAT.title: Second That
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FOLLOW_UP.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to each enemy that was attacked by an ally this turn.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FOLLOW_UP.title: Follow Up
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SPEED_TRAINING.des: For every {SpeedTrainingPower:diff()} cards you draw during your turn, all allies draw 1 card.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SMOKE_BOMB.descrip:
Target player takes 50% less damage from [gold]Weakened[/gold] enemies this turn.
{IfUpgraded:show:They gain 5 [gold]Block[/gold].|}
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SMOKE_BOMB.title: Smoke Bomb
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FLURRY_OF_BLADES.d: Whenever another player attacks an enemy this turn, play a Shiv targeting that enemy.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-GAMBLING_PARTY.des: All allies discard their [gold]Hand[/gold] and draw that many cards.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-PICKPOCKET.descrip:
[gold]Temporarily[/gold] steal the rightmost card from target ally's hand.
{IfUpgraded:show:Upgrade it.|}
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-PICKPOCKET.title: Pickpocket
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-ARMS_DEALER.descri: Cards that you add to other player's hands are [gold]Enchanted[/gold] with [purple]Royal Arms.[/purple]
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-ARMS_DEALER.title: Arms Dealer
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-DELEGATE.descripti: Choose a card to{IfUpgraded:show: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] and|} send to target player's [gold]Hand[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-DELEGATE.title: Delegate
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-STAR_PARTNER.title: Star Partner
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-ECONOMICS.descript: Whenever you gain {StarReq:diff()} {singleStarIcon}, all allies gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-ECONOMICS.title: Economics
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-AID_THEM.descripti: Transform any number of cards in your hand into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Assist+|Minion Assist}[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-AID_THEM.title: AID THEM!!!
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-MINION_ASSIST.desc: Target player gains {Block:diff()} block and {VigorPower:diff()} vigor.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-GRACIOUS_GIFTS.des:
Choose 1 of 3 Colorless cards.
All allies create {IfUpgraded:show:an Upgraded|a} copy of that card. Those cards gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-POWER_UP.descripti:
Powers cost {Energy:energyIcons()} more.
When you play a Power, choose an ally and also play it on them.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-POWER_UP.title: Power Up
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-VOLATILE_REACTOR.d:
Each ally gains {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Add {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} Burns to your hand and {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} Burns to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FILTER.description: At the start of each turn, move the first {FilterPower:diff()} Status cards from each player's [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FILTER.title: Filter
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-CYBERNETICS.descri:
[gold]Evoke[/gold] your next orb.
Target ally gains 1 Orb Slot, {FocusPower:diff()} [gold]Focus[/gold], and [gold]Channels[/gold] the evoked orb.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-CYBERNETICS.title: Cybernetics
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SPIRIT_BOMB.title: Spirit Bomb
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FREY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Increase this damage by {Increase:diff()} whenever ANYONE plays a [gold]Frey[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FREY.title: Frey
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SYMBIOSIS.title: Symbiosis
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-LEND_ENERGY.descri: Increase the damage of the [gold]Spirit[/gold] by {boostValue:diff()} {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} times.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-LEND_ENERGY.title: Lend Energy
